name: Reduced Occupational Tax for Small Firearms Importers and Manufacturers

eligibility.description: Available to firearms importers and manufacturers whose gross receipts for the most recent taxable year were less than $500,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the annual special occupational tax from $1,000 to $500 for businesses with gross receipts under $500,000.
